title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF OBAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF POLANCO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO OBAY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2996 / 55 OG No. 40, 8449 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2605, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF OBAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF POLANCO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO OBAY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Obay in the Municipality of Polanco, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is converted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Obay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
